_comment: Project-scope MCP server registration. The simplest install path is `claude mcp add --scope project rebotica rbtc -- mcp serve`, which writes the entry below to `.mcp.json` at the project root. If you prefer to edit by hand, save the `mcpServers` block (everything except `_comment`) to `.mcp.json` at the project root. The 'rebotica' key becomes the MCP server prefix: tools surface as mcp__rebotica__review_diff, etc. Change `command` if `rbtc` is not on PATH (use an absolute path).
